title: Health Officials Race to Track Hantavirus Cruise Ship Outbreak but Predict ‘Limited’ Spread
summary_full: A Dutch flight attendant and French national were among the latest to be tested in connection with a deadly outbreak on a cruise ship. But an analysis in South Africa showed no mutations in viral samples.
summary_public: A Dutch flight attendant and French national were among the latest to be tested in connection with a deadly outbreak on a cruise ship. But an analysis in South Africa showed no mutations in viral samples.
